findings.evidence: `TauCeti/Algebra/HopfAlgebra/Quotient.lean:71-95` forwards each declaration to `Bialgebra.Quotient.*`; the existing general declarations are at `TauCeti/Algebra/Bialgebra/Quotient.lean:98`, `:123`, `:131`, and `:140`.
findings.fix: Remove these declarations too and update the internal callers to use `Bialgebra.Quotient.liftBialgHom I.toIdeal`, `Bialgebra.Quotient.liftBialgHom_mk`, `Bialgebra.Quotient.liftBialgHom_comp_mkBialgHom`, and `Bialgebra.Quotient.liftBialgHom_unique` directly.
findings.issue: `HopfIdeal.liftBialgHom` and its three lemmas are direct specializations of `Bialgebra.Quotient.liftBialgHom I.toIdeal` and the matching lemmas, so this retains a parallel API after removing the other wrappers.

summary: The PR removes several dead wrappers but leaves the Hopf-ideal quotient file consisting of another direct wrapper layer over the existing bialgebra quotient API.
